title: modeliing_mergiong_jets_in_coflowing_envirnonemnt
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
1.  **Mathematical equations:**

    *   Im = integral from -lp/2 to lp/2, integral from -infinity to infinity of [ue/Ue]^2 * (dz/lp) * (dy/b)
    *   Iq = integral from -lp/2 to lp/2, integral from -infinity to infinity of [ue/Ue] * (dz/lp) * (dy/b)
    *   IUc*b*lp + IqUc*b*lp = C0Q0
    *   Ic = integral from -lp/2 to lp/2, integral from -infinity to infinity of [c/C] * (dz/lp) * (dy/b)
    *   Iqc = integral from -lp/2 to lp/2, integral from -infinity to infinity of [cue/CUe] * (dz/lp) * (dy/b)
    *   dMe = ue * (ue + Ua) * dA = sum from -infinity to infinity of [ue,axi * (ue,axi + Ua) * dA]
    *   dqc = c * (ue + Ua) * dA = sum from -infinity to infinity of [caxi * (ue,axi + Ua) * dA]
    *   Ue >> Ua
    *   dMe = ue^2 * dA = sum from -infinity to infinity of [ue,axi ^2 * dA]

2.  **Graphs/charts:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

3.  **Tables:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

4.  **Diagrams:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

5.  **Key numbers, constants, parameters:**

    *   ue: local excess velocity
    *   Ue: centerline excess velocity
    *   Ua: ambient velocity
    *   Me0: initial excess momentum flux
    *   b: characteristic width or spread of the velocity profile, where ue/Ue = e^-1
    *   lp: port spacing
    *   c: local tracer concentration
    *   C: centerline tracer concentration
    *   C0: initial tracer concentration
    *   Q0: initial volume flux of the flow
    *   axi: Subscript indicates quantities in axisymmetric flow
    *   dA: elemental area

title: modeliing_mergiong_jets_in_coflowing_envirnonemnt
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
```
1.  Mathematical equations:

dqc = uccdA = Σue,axi caxi dA  (10)

ue / Ue = (exp[-(y/(b/√2))^2] Σ exp[-(z+nlp)/(b/√2)]^2] ) / (Σ exp[-(nlp)/(b/√2)]^2)^(1/2) (11)

uc / UC = (Σ exp[-((z+nlp)^2 + y^2)/(b^2)] * (1+λ^2)/λ^2))/ (Σ exp[-(nlp)/(b/√2)]^(2)*(1+λ^2)/λ^2) (12)

dMe = Ua ueda = Ua Σ ue,axi dA (13)

dqc = Ua c dA = Ua Σ caxi dA (14)

ue / Ue = (exp[-(y/b)^2] Σ exp[-(z+nlp)/b]^2) / (Σ exp[-(nlp)/b]^2) (15)

c/C = (Σ exp[-((z+nlp)^2 + y^2) / (λ^2 * b^2)]) / (Σ exp[-(nlp)/(λb)]^2) (16)

2.  Graphs/charts: NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

3.  Tables: NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

4.  Diagrams: NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

5.  Key numbers, constants, parameters:

Ue << Ua
 y, z, lp, b, n, λ, Ue, UC, c, C
```
